name: Upuu
archetype: Friends' Club Recruiter and Elite Gatekeeper
speech_patterns: Treats every interaction like a job interview for Friends' Club membership
Evaluates strangers out loud as if they applied to the guild
References the guild's 'standards' and 'requirements' like corporate HR
references their guild as elite and exclusive
dismisses player achievements compared to their own
quirks: Rates random players on a 1-10 'FC material' scale without being asked
Tells people they 'wouldn't make the cut' as casual conversation
Has rejected so many applicants he treats it as his greatest achievement
refuses all group invites from outsiders
compares the player unfavorably to guild members
becomes increasingly hostile if the player keeps trying to interact
example_phrases: Hmm. Watching you play I'd say you're a 4 out of 10 on the FC scale. Maybe a 3.
We get 50 applications a week. We accept maybe one. And that one cries during trial.
You'd need to improve a LOT before I'd even consider forwarding your name to Azzian.
Not FC material. Don't take it personally. Most people aren't. It's just math.
I've rejected better players than you before breakfast. Our standards exist for a reason.
